'''鈭歜-zh-r''' ('''bazhara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoard|hoard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoard|hoard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| bazhara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazharithi|bazharithi]] || [[word:bazhariji|bazhariji]] || [[word:bazharishi|bazharishi]] || [[word:bazhari|bazhari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazharuthuth|bazharuthuth]] || [[word:bazharujuj|bazharujuj]] || [[word:bazharushush|bazharushush]] || [[word:bazhar|bazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazharuthu|bazharuthu]] || [[word:bazharuju|bazharuju]] || [[word:bazharushu|bazharushu]] || [[word:bazharu|bazharu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazharufuth|bazharufuth]] || [[word:bazharufuj|bazharufuj]] || [[word:bazharufush|bazharufush]] || [[word:bazharuf|bazharuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazharethe|bazharethe]] || [[word:bazhareje|bazhareje]] || [[word:bazhareshe|bazhareshe]] || [[word:bazhare|bazhare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazharothoth|bazharothoth]] || [[word:bazharojoj|bazharojoj]] || [[word:bazharoshosh|bazharoshosh]] || [[word:bazhar|bazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazharotho|bazharotho]] || [[word:bazharojo|bazharojo]] || [[word:bazharosho|bazharosho]] || [[word:bazharo|bazharo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazharofoth|bazharofoth]] || [[word:bazharofoj|bazharofoj]] || [[word:bazharofosh|bazharofosh]] || [[word:bazharof|bazharof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazhar忙th忙|bazhar忙th忙]] || [[word:bazhar忙j忙|bazhar忙j忙]] || [[word:bazhar忙sh忙|bazhar忙sh忙]] || [[word:bazhar忙|bazhar忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazharathath|bazharathath]] || [[word:bazharajaj|bazharajaj]] || [[word:bazharashash|bazharashash]] || [[word:bazhar|bazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazharatha|bazharatha]] || [[word:bazharaja|bazharaja]] || [[word:bazharasha|bazharasha]] || [[word:bazhara|bazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazharafath|bazharafath]] || [[word:bazharafaj|bazharafaj]] || [[word:bazharafash|bazharafash]] || [[word:bazharaf|bazharaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bazharasha|bazharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobazharasha|gobazharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibazharasha|gokibazharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bazharn眉sha|bazharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobazharnkn眉sha|gobazharnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibazharn眉sha|gokibazharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazharsh毛sha|bazharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazharnksh毛sha|gobazharnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazharsh毛sha|gokibazharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazharosha|bazharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazharnkrosha|gobazharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazharosha|gokibazharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bazharmusha|bazharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazharnkmusha|gobazharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazharmusha|gokibazharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bazharsherasha|bazharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobazharnksherasha|gobazharnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibazharsherasha|gokibazharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bazharngasha|bazharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobazharnkngasha|gobazharnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibazharngasha|gokibazharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bazharyasha|bazharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobazharnkyasha|gobazharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibazharyasha|gokibazharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bazharyamasha|bazharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobazharnkyamasha|gobazharnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibazharyamasha|gokibazharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazharn眉sh毛sha|bazharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazharnkn眉sh毛sha|gobazharnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazharn眉sh毛sha|gokibazharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazharn眉rosha|bazharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazharnkn眉rosha|gobazharnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazharn眉rosha|gokibazharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazharn眉musha|bazharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazharnkn眉musha|gobazharnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazharn眉musha|gokibazharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazharsh毛n眉sha|bazharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazharnksh毛n眉sha|gobazharnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazharsh毛n眉sha|gokibazharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazharsh毛rosha|bazharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazharnksh毛rosha|gobazharnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazharsh毛rosha|gokibazharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazharsh毛musha|bazharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazharnksh毛musha|gobazharnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazharsh毛musha|gokibazharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazharon眉sha|bazharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazharnkron眉sha|gobazharnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazharon眉sha|gokibazharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazharosh毛sha|bazharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazharnkrosh毛sha|gobazharnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazharosh毛sha|gokibazharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazharomusha|bazharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazharnkromusha|gobazharnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazharomusha|gokibazharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazharmun眉sha|bazharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazharnkmun眉sha|gobazharnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazharmun眉sha|gokibazharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazharmush毛sha|bazharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazharnkmush毛sha|gobazharnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazharmush毛sha|gokibazharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazharmurosha|bazharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazharnkmurosha|gobazharnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazharmurosha|gokibazharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bazhar|bazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙zh忙r|b忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobazhar|hobazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙zh忙r|hob忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobazhar|hohobazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙zh忙r|hohob忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉bazhar|n眉bazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙zh忙r|n眉b忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉bazhar|n眉n眉bazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙zh忙r|n眉n眉b忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂bazhar|n茂bazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙zh忙r|n茂b忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂bazhar|n茂n茂bazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙zh忙r|n茂n茂b忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubazhar|lubazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙zh忙r|lub忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubazhar|lulubazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙zh忙r|lulub忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libazhar|libazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙zh忙r|lib忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibazhar|lilibazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙zh忙r|lilib忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobazhar|kobazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙zh忙r|kob忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobazhar|kokobazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙zh忙r|kokob忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebazhar|kebazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙zh忙r|keb忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebazhar|kekebazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙zh忙r|kekeb忙zh忙r]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
